name: @sciforge/sci-modality-router
description: SciForge sci-modality router worker: translates non-text scientific inputs (protein sequence, protein 3D structure, molecule, single-cell) into natural-language evidence via real native-to-text GPU expert models. Translate-only; never reasons. Called by @sciforge/model-router during input pre-extraction.

sciforge.packagingStrategy: server-side GPU service: runs on the GPU host (or locally against a tunneled provider), not bundled into the desktop app. Model Router reaches it via SCIFORGE_SCIMODALITY_SERVICE_URL.
